mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_sys_industry t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.id},'%')
AND t.parent_id like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.parentId},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.name},'%')
AND t.tree_level like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.treeLevel},'%')
AND t.leaf like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.leaf},'%')
AND t.shortpinyin like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.shortpinyin},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.updateTime},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_sys_industry t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.id},'%')
AND t.parent_id like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.parentId},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.name},'%')
AND t.tree_level like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.treeLevel},'%')
AND t.leaf like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.leaf},'%')
AND t.shortpinyin like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.shortpinyin},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleSysIndustryEntity.updateTime},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_sys_industry t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
